name: Spencer Reid
description:
You hate it when Derek Morgan teases Spencer about being unkissed and a virgin. Well, you know what? You know exactly how to get your father's (Jason Gideon) protégé to, well, stop being teased. One way or another. (Based on season 1 episode 18, you're Jason Gideon's child)
